note: Design binding (implementation is a later, gated step). The bridge is a standalone adapter + a call to the EXISTING answer contract. It creates NO Claim, touches NO admission gate, adds NO always-on observer. Format + provenance-preserving wiring only.

reused_current_code.answer_question: egl/self_grounding.py:254 answer_question(question, records=..., system=...) -> (answer_dict, retrieved_ids, raw). Accepts external records + system override ('ESDE 等 別 workload 用', :257).
reused_current_code.validate_answer: egl/self_grounding.py:296 validate_answer(ans, corpus_ids) -> M1 GROUNDING_INTEGRITY / M2 SEMANTIC_PLACEMENT / M3 FORMAT (deterministic, hermetic).
reused_current_code.records_block: egl/self_grounding.py:242 _records_block reads r['record_id'], r['source_class'], r['ordinal'], r['text'].

constructs.name: frozen source boundary
constructs.site: read scheduler_exhibit_candidates.json records where incident=='HBB-30'; iterate candidates with cand_idx
constructs.present_criterion: reads only the pinned artifact; no regeneration; no rubric/scorer read
constructs.invalid_if: re-runs the exhibit, reads a scorer/rubric file, or reads a live-growing ledger

constructs.name: provenance identity
constructs.present_criterion: identity mirrors the exhibit opaque_id scheme; run_ref is the artifact hash (no fabricated run_id); parent_ref OMITTED (deltas ephemeral)
constructs.invalid_if: a field absent in the source is invented (esp. parent_ref / a fake run_id)

constructs.name: format-only adapter
constructs.site: candidate str -> {record_id, source_class='HBB_EXHIBIT_INTERMEDIATE', ordinal, text=candidate (byte-identical), provenance=source_ref}
constructs.present_criterion: text preserved byte-for-byte; NO semantic verdict field (no correctness/tension/suspicious/premise/validity/relevance/rubric)
constructs.invalid_if: adapter emits any judgement field, mutates text, or attaches a rubric label

constructs.name: existing answer contract
constructs.site: answer_question(question=t0_stuck_frame, records=adapted, system=NEUTRAL, k=len(records)) -> answer_dict; then validate_answer(answer_dict, {r['record_id']})
constructs.present_criterion: uses answer_question unchanged; k>=len(records) so nothing silently dropped; validate_answer run to enforce grounding
constructs.invalid_if: answer_question modified, open_gaps hand-written, or validate_answer skipped

constructs.name: neutral system prompt (no rubric)
constructs.site: system = 'given generated intermediate RECORDS, return answer_claims (answer the material supports) + open_gaps (unresolved considerations present); ONLY provided records; cite record_ids in source_trace; JSON with ANSWER_KEYS'
constructs.present_criterion: contains NO DETECTION/RECONSTRUCTION/6x-correct/REC2/rubric vocabulary and NO correctness-scoring instruction; forbids outside knowledge
constructs.invalid_if: any rubric token, correctness/answer-key instruction, or 'is this the right answer' framing

constructs.name: honest reach
constructs.present_criterion: does NOT claim to populate status / validation_mode / non_guarantees (curation/DW paths, out of scope); does NOT call apply_outcome/gates.decide
constructs.invalid_if: the bridge forges a Claim, a status, a validation_mode, or a non_guarantees list

constructs.name: normal-path isolation
constructs.site: adapter invoked explicitly from the HBB/exhibit side; no change to ordinary EGL question flow
constructs.present_criterion: no classifier/heuristic/always-on observer added to the normal path; normal path byte-unchanged
constructs.invalid_if: an always-on hook, a query classifier, or an auto-surface of retained material is added to ordinary questions

constructs.name: snapshot pin (DE-0132)
constructs.site: assert sha256(scheduler_exhibit_candidates.json)==b7c98296...; corpus = ONLY exhibit material, never EGL ledgers
constructs.present_criterion: input pinned by hash; no self-reference to DESIGN_EVIDENCE_LEDGER/REVIEW_LEDGER; reproducible
constructs.invalid_if: input read live/unpinned, or EGL's own ledgers fed into the corpus (self-reference)

authority_invariants.generated_ne_validated: bridge creates no Claim (never calls apply_outcome)
authority_invariants.retained_ne_evidence: records fed to answer_question are answer-layer inputs, not admitted evidence
authority_invariants.open_gap_ne_false_premise: open_gaps is a non-authoritative list; no premise marked false
authority_invariants.unresolved_ne_rejection: answer_claims and open_gaps coexist (no exclusivity; verified render layer)
authority_invariants.user_final_authority: gates.py:2-3 LLM no DB write; user 裁定

primary_outcome: answer_claims + open_gaps produced from HBB-30 intermediate material via the existing answer contract, source-trace grounded, with all 8 authority invariants held.
acceptance_gate: independent construct audit confirms B-SRC/B-ID/B-ADAPT/B-TGT/B-SYS/B-FLOW/B-ISO/B-PIN + authority invariants + no-bypass + no-rubric BEFORE implementation.
status: DESIGN BINDING v0.1 DRAFTED — awaiting independent construct audit; implementation/run/commit held.
